verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ርእየ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ሕልመ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቀውም ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ፈለግ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass after two full years that Pharao had a dream. He thought he stood upon the bank of the river.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass at the end of two full years, that Pharaoh dreamed: and, behold, he stood by the river.

verses.geez:
ወናሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ እምነ ፡ ፈለግ ፡ የዐርጉ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወሠናያን ፡ ወሥቡሓን ፡ ሥጋሆሙ ፡ ወይትረዐዩ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶት ።

translations.lxx: And lo, there came up as it were out of the river seven cows, fair in appearance, and choice of flesh, and they fed on the sedge.
translations.kjv: And, behold, there came up out of the river seven well favoured kine and fatfleshed; and they fed in a meadow.

verses.geez:
ወዐርጉ ፡ ካልኣን ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ እምድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ወእኩይ ፡ ራእዮሙ ፡ ወደገደግ ፡ ሥጋሆሙ ፡ ወይትረዐዩ ፡ ኀበ
                  ፡ እልክቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ፈለግ ።

translations.lxx: And other seven cows came up after these out of the river, ill-favoured and lean-fleshed, and fed by the other cows on the bank of the river.
translations.kjv: And, behold, seven other kine came up after them out of the river, ill favoured and leanfleshed; and stood by the other kine upon the brink of the river.

verses.geez:
ወውሕጥዎሙ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ እለ ፡ እኩይ ፡ ራእዮሙ ፡ ወደገደግ ፡ ሥጋሆሙ ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡
                  እለ ፡ ሥቡሕ ፡ ሥጋሆሙ ፡ ወሠናይ ፡ ራእዮሙ ፡ ወነቅሀ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And the seven ill-favoured and lean cows devoured the seven well-favoured and choice-fleshed cows; and Pharao awoke.
translations.kjv: And the ill favoured and leanfleshed kine did eat up the seven well favoured and fat kine. So Pharaoh awoke.

verses.geez: ወደገመ ፡ ሐሊመ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ዐርጉ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ሥርው ፡ ኅሩያን ፡ ወሠናየን ።

translations.lxx: And he dreamed again. And, behold, seven ears came up on one stalk, choice and good.
translations.kjv: And he slept and dreamed the second time: and, behold, seven ears of corn came up upon one stalk, rank and good.

verses.geez: ወናሁ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ቀጢናን ፡ ወዕቡራን ፡ ወወፅኡ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And, behold, seven ears thin and blasted with the wind, grew up after them.
translations.kjv: And, behold, seven thin ears and blasted with the east wind sprung up after them.

verses.geez:
ወውኅጥዎሙ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ቀጢናን ፡ ወዕቡራን ፡ [ለእልክቱ ፡ ፯ሰዊት ፡ ኅሩያን ፡ ወምሉኣን ፡]
                  ወተንሥአ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወአእመረ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሐለመ ።

translations.lxx: And the seven thin ears and blasted with the wind devoured the seven choice and full ears; and Pharao awoke, and it was a dream.
translations.kjv: And the seven thin ears devoured the seven rank and full ears. And Pharaoh awoke, and, behold, it was a dream.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ጸብሐ ፡ ተሀውከት ፡ ነፍሱ ፡ ወለአከ ፡ ይጸውዕዎሙ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ መፈክራነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡
                  ጠቢባኒሆሙ ፡ ወነገሮሙ ፡ ሕልሞ ፡ ወስእኑ ፡ ፈክሮ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And it was morning, and his soul was troubled; and he sent and called all the interpreters of Egypt, and all her wise men; and Pharao related to them his dream, and there was no one to interpret it to Pharao.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass in the morning that his spirit was troubled; and he sent and called for all the magicians of Egypt, and all the wise men thereof: and Pharaoh told them his dream; but there was none that could interpret them unto Pharaoh.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ሊቀ ፡ ቀዳሕያን ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ኀጢአትየ ፡ እዜከር ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ዮም ።

translations.lxx: And the chief cupbearer spoke to Pharao, saying, I this day remember my fault:
translations.kjv: Then spake the chief butler unto Pharaoh, saying, I do remember my faults this day:

verses.geez: ፈርዖን ፡ ተምዕዖሙ ፡ ለአግብርቲሁ ፡ ወወደየነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሞቅሕ ፡ ኪያየ ፡ ወሊቀ ፡ ኀባዝያን ።

translations.lxx: Pharao was angry with his servants, and put us in prison in the house of the captain of the guard, both me and the chief baker.
translations.kjv: Pharaoh was wroth with his servants, and put me in ward in the captain of the guard’s house, both me and the chief baker:

verses.geez: ወሐለምነ ፡ ሕልመ ፡ ክልኤነ ፡ አነሂ ፡ ወውእቱሂ ፡ በበዚአነ ፡ ሐለምነ ።

translations.lxx: And we had a dream both in one night, I and he; we saw, each according to his dream.
translations.kjv: And we dreamed a dream in one night, I and he; we dreamed each man according to the interpretation of his dream.

verses.geez: ወሀሎ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ዕብራዊ ፡ ወሬዛ ፡ ዘሊቀ ፡ መበስላን ፡ ወነገርናሁ ፡ ወፈከረ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: And there was there with us a young man, a Hebrew servant of the captain of the guard; and we related to him our dreams, and he interpreted them to us.
translations.kjv: And there was there with us a young man, an Hebrew, servant to the captain of the guard; and we told him, and he interpreted to us our dreams; to each man according to his dream he did interpret.

verses.geez: ወኮነነ ፡ በከመ ፡ ፈከረ ፡ ለነ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ረከብነ ፡ አነሂ ፡ ገባእኩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሢመትየ ፡ ወለዝክቱኒ ፡ ሰቀልዎ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass, as he interpreted them to us, so also it happened, both that I was restored to my office, and that he was hanged.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as he interpreted to us, so it was; me he restored unto mine office, and him he hanged.

verses.geez:
ወለአከ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወጸውዕዎ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ወአውጽእዎ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሞቅሕ ፡ ወላፀይዎ ፡ ወወለጡ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡
                  ወአምጽእዎ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao having sent, called Joseph; and they brought him out from the prison, and shaved him, and changed his dress, and he came to Pharao.
translations.kjv: Then Pharaoh sent and called Joseph, and they brought him hastily out of the dungeon: and he shaved himself, and changed his raiment, and came in unto Pharaoh.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ሕልመ ፡ ሐለምኩ ፡ ወዘይፌክር ፡ ሊተ ፡ ኀጣእኩ ፡ ወሰማዕኩ ፡ አነ ፡ በእንቲአከ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ሰማዕከ ፡ ሕልመ ፡ ወፈከርከ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to Joseph, I have seen a vision, and there is no one to interpret it; but I have heard say concerning thee that thou didst hear dreams and interpret them.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, I have dreamed a dream, and there is none that can interpret it: and I have heard say of thee, that thou canst understand a dream to interpret it.

verses.geez: ወአውሥኦ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሀቦ ፡ ኢይክል ፡ ፈክሮ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph answered Pharao and said, Without God an answer of safety shall not be given to Pharao.
translations.kjv: And Joseph answered Pharaoh, saying, It is not in me: God shall give Pharaoh an answer of peace.

verses.geez: ወነገሮ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ እሬኢ ፡ በሕልምየ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ እቀውም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ፈለግ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao spoke to Joseph, saying, In my dream methought I stood by the bank of the river;
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, In my dream, behold, I stood upon the bank of the river:

verses.geez:
ወእምውስተ ፡ ፈለግ ፡ የዐርጉ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ እማዕዶተ ፡ ፈለግ ፡ ሥቡሓን ፡ ሥጋሆሙ ፡ ወሠናይ ፡ ራእዮሙ ፡
                  ወይትረዐዩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶት ።

translations.lxx: and there came up as it were out of the river, seven cows well-favoured and choice-fleshed, and they fed on the sedge.
translations.kjv: And, behold, there came up out of the river seven kine, fatfleshed and well favoured; and they fed in a meadow:

verses.geez:
ወናሁ ፡ ካልኣን ፡ [፯]አልህምት ፡ የዐርጉ ፡ እምድኅሬሆሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ፈለግ ፡ እኩያን ፡ ወሕሡም ፡ ራእዮሙ ፡
                  ወደገደግ ፡ ሥጋሆሙ ፡ ወኢርኢኩ ፡ ዘከማሆሙ ፡ ሕሡመ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And behold seven other cows came up after them out of the river, evil and ill-favoured and lean-fleshed, such that I never saw worse in all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And, behold, seven other kine came up after them, poor and very ill favoured and leanfleshed, such as I never saw in all the land of Egypt for badness:

verses.geez: ወውኅጥዎሙ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ደገደጋን ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ሥቡሓን ፡ ወሠናያን ።

translations.lxx: And the seven ill-favoured and thin cows ate up the seven first good and choice cows.
translations.kjv: And the lean and the ill favoured kine did eat up the first seven fat kine:

verses.geez:
ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከርሦሙ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘአልቦ ፡ ዘቦአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከርሦሙ ፡ ወገጾሙኒ ፡ ሕሡም ፡ ከመ ፡ ቀዳሚ
                  ፡ ወነቃህኩ ፡ ወሰከብኩ ፡ ካዕበ ።

translations.lxx: And they went into their bellies; and it was not perceptible that they had gone into their bellies, and their appearance was ill-favoured, as also at the beginning; and after I awoke I slept,
translations.kjv: And when they had eaten them up, it could not be known that they had eaten them; but they were still ill favoured, as at the beginning. So I awoke.

verses.geez: ወርኢኩ ፡ በሕልም ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ይወጽኡ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ሥርው ፡ ወምሉኣን ፡ ወሠናያን ።

translations.lxx: and saw again in my sleep, and as it were seven ears came up on one stem, full and good.
translations.kjv: And I saw in my dream, and, behold, seven ears came up in one stalk, full and good:

verses.geez: ወካልኣን ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ቀጢናን ፡ ወይቡሳን ፡ ይወፅኡ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And other seven ears, thin and blasted with the wind, sprang up close to them.
translations.kjv: And, behold, seven ears, withered, thin, and blasted with the east wind, sprung up after them:

verses.geez:
ወውኅጥዎሙ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ቀጢናን ፡ ወይቡሳን ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ምሉኣን ፡ ወሠናያን ፡ ወነገርክዎሙ ፡ ለመፈክራን ፡ ወአልቦ ፡
                  ዘፈከሩ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And the seven thin and blasted ears devoured the seven fine and full ears: so I spoke to the interpreters, and there was no one to explain it to me.
translations.kjv: And the thin ears devoured the seven good ears: and I told this unto the magicians; but there was none that could declare it to me.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ሕልሙ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘይገብር ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አርአዮ ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said to Pharao, The dream of Pharao is one; whatever God does, he has shewn to Pharao.
translations.kjv: And Joseph said unto Pharaoh, The dream of Pharaoh is one: God hath shewed Pharaoh what he is about to do.

verses.geez:
እሉ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ሠናያን ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወእሉሂ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ሠናያን ፡ ሰባዕቱ
                  ፡ ዓመት ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ሕልሙ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: The seven good cows are seven years, and the seven good ears are seven years; the dream of Pharao is one.
translations.kjv: The seven good kine are seven years; and the seven good ears are seven years: the dream is one.

verses.geez:
ወእሉ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ደገደጋን ፡ እለ ፡ የዐርጉ ፡ እምድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወእሉሂ ፡
                  ሰባዕቱ ፡ ሠዊት ፡ ቀጢናን ፡ ወዕቡራን ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዘረኃብ ።

translations.lxx: And the seven thin kine that came up after them are seven years; and the seven thin and blasted ears are seven years; there shall be seven years of famine.
translations.kjv: And the seven thin and ill favoured kine that came up after them are seven years; and the seven empty ears blasted with the east wind shall be seven years of famine.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ቃል ፡ ዘ[እ]ቤሎ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ዘይገብር ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አርአዮ ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And as for the word which I have told Pharao, whatsoever God intends to do, he has shewn to Pharao:
translations.kjv: This is the thing which I have spoken unto Pharaoh: What God is about to do he sheweth unto Pharaoh.

verses.geez: ናሁ ፡ ይመጽእ ፡ ፯ዓመት ፡ ዘጽጋብ ፡ ብዙኅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: behold, for seven years there is coming great plenty in all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: Behold, there come seven years of great plenty throughout all the land of Egypt:

verses.geez: ወይመጽእ ፡ ፯ዓመት ፡ ዘረኃብ ፡ እምድኅሬሁ ፡ ወይረስዕዎ ፡ ለጽጋብ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: But there shall come seven years of famine after these, and they shall forget the plenty that shall be in all Egypt, and the famine shall consume the land.
translations.kjv: And there shall arise after them seven years of famine; and all the plenty shall be forgotten in the land of Egypt; and the famine shall consume the land;

verses.geez:
ወየኀልቅ ፡ በረኃብ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ብሔር ፡ እምነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ዘይመጽእ ፡ እምድኅሬሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And the plenty shall not be known in the land by reason of the famine that shall be after this, for it shall be very grievous.
translations.kjv: And the plenty shall not be known in the land by reason of that famine following; for it shall be very grievous.

verses.geez:
ወዘደገመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ሐሊሞቶ ፡ እስመ ፡ እሙን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ እምኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወፍጡነ ፡ ይገብሮ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለዝንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And concerning the repetition of the dream to Pharao twice, it is because the saying which is from God shall be true, and God will hasten to accomplish it.
translations.kjv: And for that the dream was doubled unto Pharaoh twice; it is because the thing is established by God, and God will shortly bring it to pass.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ኅሥሥ ፡ ለከ ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ጠቢበ ፡ ወልብወ ፡ ወሢሞ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: Now then, look out a wise and prudent man, and set him over the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: Now therefore let Pharaoh look out a man discreet and wise, and set him over the land of Egypt.

verses.geez: ወይግበር ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ መዛግብተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወይድፍንዎ ፡ ለእክለ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ዘ፯ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And let Pharao make and appoint local governors over the land; and let them take up a fifth part of all the produce of the land of Egypt for the seven years of the plenty.
translations.kjv: Let Pharaoh do this, and let him appoint officers over the land, and take up the fifth part of the land of Egypt in the seven plenteous years.

verses.geez:
ወያስተጋብእዎ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ እክል ፡ ዘ፯ዓመት ፡ ዘጽጋብ ፡ ወያስተጋብእ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ስርናዮ ፡ ወእክሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አህጉር
                  ፡ ወይትዐቀብ ።

translations.lxx: And let them gather all the food of these seven good years that are coming, and let the corn be gathered under the hand of Pharao; let food be kept in the cities.
translations.kjv: And let them gather all the food of those good years that come, and lay up corn under the hand of Pharaoh, and let them keep food in the cities.

verses.geez:
ወይኩን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እክል ፡ ዘየዐቅቡ ፡ ሲሳየ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ለአመ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ዘይመጽእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔረ ፡
                  ግብጽ ፡ ወኢይሙት ፡ ሰብኣ ፡ በረኃብ ።

translations.lxx: And the stored food shall be for the land against the seven years of famine, which shall be in the land of Egypt; and the land shall not be utterly destroyed by the famine.
translations.kjv: And that food shall be for store to the land against the seven years of famine, which shall be in the land of Egypt; that the land perish not through the famine.

verses.geez: ወአደሞ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሰብኡ ።

translations.lxx: And the word was pleasing in the sight of Pharao, and in the sight of all his servants.
translations.kjv: And the thing was good in the eyes of Pharaoh, and in the eyes of all his servants.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ሰብኡ ፡ ቦኑ ፡ እንከ ፡ ዘተረክበ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘመንፈሰ ፡ እግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ ላዕሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to all his servants, Shall we find such a man as this, who has the Spirit of God in him?
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto his servants, Can we find such a one as this is, a man in whom the Spirit of God is?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ እስመ ፡ ለከ ፡ አርየከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ዘይጠብበከ
                  ፡ ወዘይሌቡ ፡ እምኔከ ፤

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to Joseph, Since God has shewed thee all these things, there is not a wiser or more prudent man than thou.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, Forasmuch as God hath shewed thee all this, there is none so discreet and wise as thou art:

verses.geez:
አንተ ፡ ኩን ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ቤትየ ፡ ወለቃለ ፡ ዚአከ ፡ ይትአዘዝ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወእንበለ ፡ መንበር ፡ አልቦ
                  ፡ ዘ[እ]ፈደፍደከ ፡ አነ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt be over my house, and all my people shall be obedient to thy word; only in the throne will I excel thee.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt be over my house, and according unto thy word shall all my people be ruled: only in the throne will I be greater than thou.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ናሁ ፡ እሠይመከ ፡ አነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to Joseph, Behold, I set thee this day over all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, See, I have set thee over all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወአውጽአ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ሕልቀቶ ፡ እምነ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወወደየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ወአልበሶ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ሜላ[ት]
                  ፡ ወአዕነቆ ፡ ባዝግና ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክሳዱ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao took his ring off his hand, and put it on the hand of Joseph, and put on him a robe of fine linen, and put a necklace of gold about his neck.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh took off his ring from his hand, and put it upon Joseph’s hand, and arrayed him in vestures of fine linen, and put a gold chain about his neck;

verses.geez: ወአጽዐኖ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፈረስ ፡ ዘዚአሁ ፡ ወዖደ ፡ ዐዋዲ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ወሤሞ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And he mounted him on the second of his chariots, and a herald made proclamation before him; and he set him over all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And he made him to ride in the second chariot which he had; and they cried before him, Bow the knee: and he made him ruler over all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ አነ ፡ ለሊየ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ዘእንበሌከ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘእገብር ፡ ወኢምንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ
                  ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to Joseph, I am Pharao; without thee no one shall lift up his hand on all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, I am Pharaoh, and without thee shall no man lift up his hand or foot in all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዮ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ስሞ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ፍስንቶፌኔኅ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ አሴኔትሃ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ጴሜጤፌራ ፡ ማሪ ፡ ዘሀገረ ፡
                  ሄሊዮቱ ፡ ትኩኖ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao called the name of Joseph, Psonthomphanech; and he gave him Aseneth, the daughter of Petephres, priest of Heliopolis, to wife.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh called Joseph’s name Zaphnathpaaneah; and he gave him to wife Asenath the daughter of Potipherah priest of On. And Joseph went out over all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወሠላሳ ፡ ዓመቱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ አመ ፡ ይቀውም ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡
                  እምቅድመ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወአንሶሰወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph was thirty years old when he stood before Pharao, king of Egypt. And Joseph went out from the presence of Pharao, and went through all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And Joseph was thirty years old when he stood before Pharaoh king of Egypt. And Joseph went out from the presence of Pharaoh, and went throughout all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez: ወኵሎ ፡ ዘአውጽአት ፡ ምድር ፡ እክለ ፡ ዘሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዘጽጋብ ፡ ከላስስቲሁ ፤

translations.lxx: And the land produced, in the seven years of plenty, whole handfuls of corn.
translations.kjv: And in the seven plenteous years the earth brought forth by handfuls.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ እክሎ ፡ አስተጋብኡ ፡ ዘብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወዘገቡ ፡ እክለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአድያመ ፡ ብሔር ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ሲሳየ ።

translations.lxx: And he gathered all the food of the seven years, in which was the plenty in the land of Egypt; and he laid up the food in the cities; the food of the fields of a city round about it he laid up in it.
translations.kjv: And he gathered up all the food of the seven years, which were in the land of Egypt, and laid up the food in the cities: the food of the field, which was round about every city, laid he up in the same.

verses.geez:
ወዘገበ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ስርናየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኆፃ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ እስከ ፡ ስእኑ ፡ ኈልቆቶ ፡ ወዘእንበለ ፡ ኍልቍ
                  ፡ ኮነ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph gathered very much corn as the sand of the sea, until it could not be numbered, for there was no number of it.
translations.kjv: And Joseph gathered corn as the sand of the sea, very much, until he left numbering; for it was without number.

verses.geez: ወተወልዱ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ደቂቅ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ይምጻእ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ እለ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አሴኔት ።

translations.lxx: And to Joseph were born two sons, before the seven years of famine came, which Aseneth, the daughter of Petephres, priest of Heliopolis, bore to him.
translations.kjv: And unto Joseph were born two sons before the years of famine came, which Asenath the daughter of Potipherah priest of On bare unto him.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዮ ፡ ስመ ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ምናሴ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ እስመ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ሊተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ እርሳዕ ፡ ኵሎ ፡
                  ሕማምየ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘቤተ ፡ አቡየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph called the name of the first-born, Manasse; for God, said he, has made me forget all my toils, and all my father's house.
translations.kjv: And Joseph called the name of the firstborn Manasseh: For God, said he, hath made me forget all my toil, and all my father’s house.

verses.geez: ወሰመዮ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ለካልእ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ እስመ ፡ አዕበየኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ሥቃይ ።

translations.lxx: And he called the name of the second, Ephraim; for God, said he, has increased me in the land of my humiliation.
translations.kjv: And the name of the second called he Ephraim: For God hath caused me to be fruitful in the land of my affliction.

verses.geez: ወኀሊፎ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዘጽጋብ ፤

translations.lxx: And the seven years of plenty passed away, which were in the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And the seven years of plenteousness, that was in the land of Egypt, were ended.

verses.geez: አኀዘ ፡ ይምጻእ ፡ ሰባዕቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ዘረኃብ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ዮሴፍ ።

translations.lxx: And the seven years of famine began to come, as Joseph said; and there was a famine in all the land; but in all the land of Egypt there was bread.
translations.kjv: And the seven years of dearth began to come, according as Joseph had said: and the dearth was in all lands; but in all the land of Egypt there was bread.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወጸርኀ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ በእንተ ፡ እክል ፡
                  ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ [ወ]ዘይቤለክሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ግበሩ ።

translations.lxx: And all the land of Egypt was hungry; and the people cried to Pharao for bread. And Pharao said to all the Egyptians, Go to Joseph, and do whatsoever he shall tell you.
translations.kjv: And when all the land of Egypt was famished, the people cried to Pharaoh for bread: and Pharaoh said unto all the Egyptians, Go unto Joseph; what he saith to you, do.

verses.geez:
ረኃብሰ ፡ በጽሐ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወርእዮ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ መዛግብተ ፡ እክል ፡ አርኀወ ፡ ወሤጠ ፡ ለኵሉ
                  ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the famine was on the face of all the earth; and Joseph opened all the granaries, and sold to all the Egyptians.
translations.kjv: And the famine was over all the face of the earth: And Joseph opened all the storehouses, and sold unto the Egyptians; and the famine waxed sore in the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወመጽአ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ በሓውርት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሣየጥ ፡ እክለ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ኮነ ፡
                  ረኃብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ [ኵሉ ፡] ብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And all countries came to Egypt to buy of Joseph, for the famine prevailed in all the earth.
translations.kjv: And all countries came into Egypt to Joseph for to buy corn; because that the famine was so sore in all lands.
